message:
test(fcp-oauth,fcp-manifest): expand oauth and manifest test suites

fcp-oauth: 330 → 445 (+115 tests) across error, pkce, token, oauth1, oauth2, provider
fcp-manifest: 341 → 438 (+97 tests) covering validation, TOML parsing, network constraints, supply chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
